confidence_thresholds.description: Minimum confidence scores by parameter type for reliable detection

thresholds.description: Lane width detection requires high confidence for accurate geometry
Curvature detection can tolerate slightly lower confidence
Marking type classification requires high confidence for safety
Marking color classification requires high confidence for safety
Lane count must be reliably detected

rules.name: Lane Width Detection Confidence
rules.description: Lane width detection requires minimum 85% confidence
rules.error_message: Lane width detection confidence below 85% threshold

rules.name: Curvature Detection Confidence
rules.formula: curvature != null and curvature != 0 implies confidence >= 0.80

rules.name: Marking Type Detection Confidence
rules.formula: (left_line_type != null or right_line_type != null) implies confidence >= 0.90
rules.description: Marking type classification requires minimum 90% confidence for safety
rules.error_message: Marking type detection confidence below 90% threshold - safety critical

rules.name: Curvature vs Speed Limit - 25 mph
rules.description: Curvature must be compatible with speed limit (R >= 170 ft for 25 mph)
rules.error_message: Curvature too sharp for speed limit 25+ mph

rules.name: Curvature vs Speed Limit - 35 mph
rules.description: Curvature must be compatible with speed limit (R >= 340 ft for 35 mph)
rules.error_message: Curvature too sharp for speed limit 35+ mph

rules.name: Curvature vs Speed Limit - 45 mph
rules.description: Curvature must be compatible with speed limit (R >= 560 ft for 45 mph)
rules.error_message: Curvature too sharp for speed limit 45+ mph

rules.name: Curvature vs Speed Limit - 55 mph
rules.description: Curvature must be compatible with speed limit (R >= 835 ft for 55 mph)
rules.error_message: Curvature too sharp for speed limit 55+ mph

rules.name: Curvature vs Speed Limit - 65 mph
rules.description: Curvature must be compatible with speed limit (R >= 1150 ft for 65 mph)
rules.error_message: Curvature too sharp for speed limit 65+ mph

rules.name: Curvature vs Speed Limit - 75 mph
rules.description: Curvature must be compatible with speed limit (R >= 1560 ft for 75 mph)
rules.error_message: Curvature too sharp for speed limit 75+ mph

rules.name: Yellow Marking on Left Edge Only
rules.formula: left_line_type not in ['solid_yellow', 'broken_yellow', 'double_yellow'] or lane_type in ['travel', 'turn_left']
rules.description: Yellow markings should only appear on left side separating opposing traffic
rules.error_message: Yellow marking on left edge - verify opposing traffic separation

rules.name: White Marking on Right Edge
rules.description: Right lane edge should have white markings, not yellow
rules.error_message: Yellow marking detected on right edge - verify lane configuration

rules.name: Lane Width Consistency Check
rules.description: Width variance should be less than 10% of lane width
rules.error_message: Lane width variance exceeds 10% - possible detection inconsistency

rules.name: Combined Lane and Shoulder Width
rules.description: Combined lane and shoulder width should provide adequate roadway
rules.error_message: Combined lane + shoulder width less than 14 ft minimum

rules.name: Boundary Continuity for OpenDRIVE Export
rules.description: Minimum continuity score required for valid OpenDRIVE export
rules.error_message: Boundary continuity too low for OpenDRIVE export - gaps in detection

rules.name: Horizontal Class Consistency with Curvature
rules.description: Horizontal class should match detected curvature
rules.error_message: Horizontal class inconsistent with detected curvature

rules.name: Lane Count vs Total Width Plausibility
rules.description: Total roadway width should be plausible for lane count
rules.error_message: Lane count may be inconsistent with detected total width

cross_parameter_validations.name: Speed-Curvature Compatibility
cross_parameter_validations.description: Curvature must allow safe operation at posted speed

cross_parameter_validations.name: Marking Color Lane Position
cross_parameter_validations.description: Yellow = opposing traffic separation, White = same direction

cross_parameter_validations.name: Facility Type Geometry Bounds
cross_parameter_validations.description: Geometry must match facility type standards
